Metadata.title: ModParks - Minecraft Mod & Plugin Platform
Metadata.description: A Japan-based platform to easily publish, search, and download Minecraft Java Edition Mods and Plugins.
Metadata.keywords: Minecraft, Mod, Plugin, Java Edition, Fabric, Forge, Paper

config.title: System Configuration
config.tagsDesc: Manage predefined tags available for projects.
config.tagsPlaceholder: Currently, tags are defined statically in the codebase. This interface is a placeholder for when tags are migrated to the database.
config.appSettingsDesc: Stored in Cloudflare KV. Changes may take up to a minute to propagate.
config.appSettingsSaved: Settings saved (may take up to a minute to propagate)
config.apiDefaultLimitHelp: Number of items returned when no limit is specified
config.apiMaxLimitHelp: Upper bound for the limit parameter
config.registrationEnabledHelp: When off, new sign-ups are rejected
config.workerVarsDesc: Opens a pull request that edits wrangler.toml on GitHub. Changes take effect once the PR is merged and deployed.
config.varProtected: This variable cannot be edited from the admin UI
config.secretsDesc: Cloudflare Workers secrets. Values cannot be read back from Cloudflare, so you can only list names and overwrite or delete them. A two-factor code is required.
config.secretProtected: This secret cannot be changed from the admin UI
config.deleteSecretConfirm: This secret will be deleted. This cannot be undone:
config.secretNameHelp: Uppercase letters, digits and underscores (e.g. RESEND_API_KEY)
config.secretValueHelp: Cannot be displayed after saving. The value is never written to the audit log.
config.totpHelp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

backup.title: Database Backup
backup.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this backup file?
backup.confirmRestore: Are you sure you want to restore from this backup? All current data will be deleted and overwritten with the backup state. You may need to log in again after restoration.
backup.restoreWarning: WARNING: Restoring the database will overwrite all current data. You will also need to log in again with an admin account contained in the restored database.
backup.downloadCurrentDataDesc: Before restoring, save the current database to your device. This is required so you can roll back if the restore turns out to be wrong.
backup.currentDataSaved: Current data saved as {key}. You can now proceed with the restore.
backup.twoFactorRequired: Two-factor authentication must be enabled to restore. Enable it from your settings.

step1.title: Discover Projects
step1.content: ModParks features a wide variety of Minecraft Mods, Plugins, Data Packs, Shaders, and more. Use our search and filters to find what you need.

step2.title: Share Your Work
step2.content: Publish your own projects or import them easily from CurseForge and Modrinth.

step3.title: Global Reach
step3.content: ModParks supports both English and Japanese. Share your creations with players all over the world!

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: API keys allow external tools to access your account. For security reasons, keys are shown only once upon creation.
apiKeys.name: Key Name
apiKeys.successGenerate: New API key generated! Please copy and save it now, as it will not be shown again.

posting.title: Posting Settings
posting.defaultProjectStatusDesc: Set the initial visibility status for newly created projects.
posting.defaultLicenseDesc: Set the initial license for newly created projects.

integration.title: External Integrations
integration.modrinthDesc: Setting a Modrinth API key allows you to import and sync projects.
integration.curseforgeDesc: Once you verify ownership, you can bulk-import that author's projects.

cfVerify.title: Ownership Verification
cfVerify.desc: Generate a verification code and temporarily add it to the Summary of your CurseForge project, then wait a few minutes and press "Verify". Verification is one-time; you may remove the code once done.
cfVerify.projectIdHelp: Enter a single Mod ID that you own (e.g. 697926)
cfVerify.codeInstruction: Paste this code into your project's summary and save, then press "Verify".
cfVerify.verifiedNow: Ownership verified. You may now remove the code.

error.notStarted: Please generate a verification code first.
error.projectNotFound: The specified project was not found. Please check the Project ID.
error.codeNotFound: The verification code was not found on the project. Make sure you added it to the summary and saved (it may take a while to propagate).
error.noAuthor: Could not retrieve the project's author information.

errors.adminPasswordRequired: For security reasons, please set a password to access the admin panel.

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorSetupDesc: Scan the following QR code with an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy) and enter the 6-digit code shown.
security.passkeysDesc: Login using biometrics (fingerprint, face ID) or security keys.

account.title: Account Management
account.changeIdDesc: If you change your ID, access from the previous ID will redirect to the new one, but older IDs will become available for others to claim.
account.languageWarning: To apply changes, please click the 'Save' button in the profile tab.
account.deleteAccountDesc: Deleting your account will place it in a soft-deleted state for 30 days before permanent removal. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
account.errorIdFormat: ID can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
account.errorEmailTaken: This email address is already in use
account.exportDataDesc: You can download your account data in various formats.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose which types of notifications you want to receive.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of ModParks ("the Service"). By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

## 1. Account Management
You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the Service and for any activities or actions under your password.

## 2. Prohibited Conduct
You agree not to engage in any of the following prohibited activities:
- Violating any laws or regulations.
- Infringing upon the rights of others.
- Uploading or distributing malware, spam, or malicious content.
- Uploading or posting content that is entirely unrelated to the purpose of this Service (sharing Minecraft-related content).

## 3. Modification of Terms
We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time without prior notice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
ModParks ("we", "our", or "us") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.

## 1. Information Collection
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, which includes your email address and username.

## 2. Use of Information
The information we collect is used to provide, maintain, and improve the Service, as well as to communicate with you.

## 3. Data Sharing
We do not share your personal information with third parties except as necessary to provide our services or as required by law.

## 4. Security
We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.
